title: AAICLAS Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 62 Posts
organization: AAI Cargo Logistics and Allied Services Company (AAICLAS)
short_info: AAI Cargo Logistics and Allied Services Company (AAICLAS) Assistant (Security) Notification 2026 has been released on 13 May 2026 on the official website. A total of 62 vacancies have been announced through the AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026. Candidates aged up to 27 years with 12th (Sr. Secondary) qualification are eligible to apply for these Assistant (Security) vacancies. The online application process for AAICLAS Assistant (Security) Recruitment 2026 will start on 11 June 2026 and remain open until 02 July 2026. Candidates can download the official notification PDF and apply

age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 27 years. Age Relaxation: SC/ST: 5 years, OBC (Non-Creamy Layer): 3 years, Ex-Servicemen: 5 years.

qualification.details: Assistant (Security) - Tirupati: 12th (Sr. Secondary) from any recognized Board/University/Institution. Minimum 60% marks for General, 55% for SC/ST. Ability to read/speak English, Hindi and/or conversant with local language. Assistant (Security) - Trichy: 12th (Sr. Secondary) from any recognized Board/University/Institution. Minimum 60% marks for General, 55% for SC/ST. Ability to read/speak English, Hindi and/or conversant with local language. Assistant (Security) - Madurai: 12th (Sr. Secondary) from any recognized Board/University/Institution. Minimum 60% marks for General, 55% for SC/ST. Ability to read/speak English, Hindi and/or conversant with local language. Assistant (Security) - Bhubaneswar: 12th (Sr. Secondary) from any recognized Board/University/Institution. Minimum 60% marks for General, 55% for SC/ST. Ability to read/speak English, Hindi and/or conversant with local language. Assistant (Security) - Udaipur: 12th (Sr. Secondary) from any recognized Board/University/Institution. Minimum 60% marks for General, 55% for SC/ST. Ability to read/speak English, Hindi and/or conversant with local language.

selection_process: Shortlisting (based on higher % marks in 12th) Interaction / Interview Merit list (based on interview marks) Document Verification
how_to_apply: Applications must be submitted online on or before 02-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of AAICLAS to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AAICLAS Assistant (Security) posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the online application for the AAICLAS Assistant (Security) recruitment is 02-07-2026.

faq.question: Q2. What is the total number of vacancies for Assistant (Security) posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 62 vacancies announced for the Assistant (Security) positions across various locations.

faq.question: Q3. What is the minimum educational qualification required for this recruitment?
faq.answer: Candidates must have passed 12th (Sr. Secondary) from a recognized Board/University/Institution with a minimum of 60% marks for General and 55% for SC/ST candidates.

faq.question: Q4. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for candidates applying for the Assistant (Security) posts is 27 years, with age relaxations applicable for reserved categories.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application fee for General category candidates?
faq.answer: The application fee for General and OBC category candidates is ₹ 500/-. SC/ST and Women candidates need to pay ₹ 100/-.

faq.question: Q6. How will candidates be selected for the Assistant (Security) posts?
faq.answer: The selection process involves shortlisting based on 12th marks, followed by an interaction/interview, and finally, a merit list based on interview marks and document verification.

faq.question: Q7. What is the salary offered for the Assistant (Security) position?
faq.answer: The consolidated salary for the Assistant (Security) post ranges from ₹ 21,500/- in the first year to ₹ 22,500/- in the third year.

faq.question: Q8. Is this a permanent job or a contract-based position?
faq.answer: The recruitment for Assistant (Security) posts is on a contract basis.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification and apply online?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF and the online application link are available in the "Important Links" section of this article.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website of AAICLAS?
faq.answer: The official website of AAI Cargo Logistics and Allied Services Company (AAICLAS) is www.aaiclas.aero.
